title: So Much Winning…For Geothermal Energy
description:
Energy Secretary Chris Wright is a big fan of geothermal energy, but he just got caught robbing Peter to pay Paul.

The post So Much Winning…For Geothermal Energy appeared first on CleanTechnica.
